name: golang-github-protonmail-go-crypto-dev
title: golang-github-protonmail-go-crypto-dev
description:
Go supplementary cryptography libraries
This module is backwards compatible with x/crypto/openpgp, so you
can simply replace all imports of golang.org/x/crypto/openpgp with
github.com/ProtonMail/go-crypto/openpgp.
.
A partial list of changes is here:
https://github.com/ProtonMail/go-crypto/issues/21#issuecomment-492792917.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-protonmail-go-crypto-dev because Go supplementary cryptography libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-protonmail-go-crypto-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-protonmail-go-crypto-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-protonmail-go-crypto-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
